channel.title: Web Agent on HH Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Web Agent on HH Blog

item.title: AI 日报 | 2026-03-20
item.description:
AI 日报 | 2026年03月20日（星期五）

📅 日期：2026年03月20日 | 📊 今日收录：15 篇论文 | 🔬 重点领域：LLM、Multimodal、Benchmark | 🚀 大模型应用：15 项

📌 今日总结

  • Loc3R-VLM (LLM): Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have made impressive progress in connecting vision and language, but they still…
  • AgentVLN (Agent): Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) requires an embodied agent to ground complex natural-language instructions into lon…
  • AERR-Nav (LLM): Zero-Shot Object Navigation (ZSON) in unknown multi-floor environments presents a significant challenge. Recent methods,…
  • MALLES (LLM): In the real economy, modern decision-making is fundamentally challenged by high-dimensional, multimodal environments, wh…
  • Feeling the Space (LLM): Recent Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown high potential for spatial reasoning within 3D scenes. Howeve…

🚀 大模型应用亮点

Loc3R-VLM: Language-based Localization and 3D Reasoning with Vision-Language Models

机构:
链接: PDF
标签: LLM, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, RAG, Alignment

Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have made impressive progress in connecting vision and language, but they still struggle with spatial understanding and viewpoint-aware reasoning. Recent efforts aim to augment the input representations with geometric cues rather than explicitly teaching mode…

AgentVLN: Towards Agentic Vision-and-Language Navigation

机构:
链接: PDF
标签: Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent, Code Generation

Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) requires an embodied agent to ground complex natural-language instructions into long-horizon navigation in unseen environments. While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) offer strong 2D semantic understanding, current VLN systems remain constrained by limited spatial p…

AERR-Nav: Adaptive Exploration-Recovery-Reminiscing Strategy for Zero-Shot Object Navigation

机构:
链接: PDF
标签: LLM, Multimodal, Robotics, Benchmark, Reasoning, Memory

Zero-Shot Object Navigation (ZSON) in unknown multi-floor environments presents a significant challenge. Recent methods, mostly based on semantic value greedy waypoint selection, spatial topology-enhanced memory, and Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) as a decision-making framework, have led to …

📚 论文一览

# 论文 第一作者 领域
1 Loc3R-VLM: Language-based Localizat… Unknown LLM, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, RAG, Alignment
2 AgentVLN: Towards Agentic Vision-an… Unknown Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent, Code Generation
3 AERR-Nav: Adaptive Exploration-Reco… Unknown LLM, Multimodal, Robotics, Benchmark, Reasoning, Memory
4 MALLES: A Multi-agent LLMs-based Ec… Unknown LLM, Agent, Multimodal, Training, RAG, Alignment
5 Feeling the Space: Egomotion-Aware … Unknown LLM, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG
6 Concept-to-Pixel: Prompt-Free Unive… Unknown LLM, Multimodal, Benchmark, Training, RAG, Medical AI, Code Generation
7 FailureMem: A Failure-Aware Multimo… Unknown LLM, Agent, Multimodal, Reasoning, Web Agent, Memory, Code Generation
8 WeatherReasonSeg: A Benchmark for W… Unknown LLM, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent
9 Process Supervision for Chain-of-Th… Unknown LLM, Benchmark, Training, Reasoning, Code Generation
10 Interpretable Traffic Responsibilit… Unknown LLM, Agent, Multimodal, Reasoning
11 ProbeFlow: Training-Free Adaptive F… Unknown Multimodal, Robotics, Benchmark, Training, RAG
12 RPMS: Enhancing LLM-Based Embodied … Unknown LLM, Agent, Reasoning, RAG, Memory
13 Facts as First Class Objects: Knowl… Unknown LLM, Benchmark, Reasoning, RAG, Memory
14 GMT: Goal-Conditioned Multimodal Tr… Unknown Multimodal, Robotics, Benchmark, Transformer, Training, Reasoning, RAG
15 Governed Memory: A Production Archi… Unknown Agent, Benchmark, RAG, Memory

🔍 详细介绍

论文1: Loc3R-VLM: Language-based Localization and 3D Reasoning with Vision-Language Models

arXiv:2603.18002v1 | | 2026-03-18

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, RAG, Alignment

摘要: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have made impressive progress in connecting vision and language, but they still struggle with spatial understanding and viewpoint-aware reasoning. Recent efforts aim to augment the input representations with geometric cues rather than explicitly teaching models to reason in 3D space. We introduce Loc3R-VLM, a framework that equips 2D Vision-Language Models …

论文2: AgentVLN: Towards Agentic Vision-and-Language Navigation

arXiv:2603.17670v1 | | 2026-03-18

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: Agent, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent, Code Generation

摘要: Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) requires an embodied agent to ground complex natural-language instructions into long-horizon navigation in unseen environments. While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) offer strong 2D semantic understanding, current VLN systems remain constrained by limited spatial perception, 2D-3D representation mismatch, and monocular scale ambiguity. In this paper, we propose A…

论文3: AERR-Nav: Adaptive Exploration-Recovery-Reminiscing Strategy for Zero-Shot Object Navigation

arXiv:2603.17712v1 | | 2026-03-18

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Multimodal, Robotics, Benchmark, Reasoning, Memory

摘要: Zero-Shot Object Navigation (ZSON) in unknown multi-floor environments presents a significant challenge. Recent methods, mostly based on semantic value greedy waypoint selection, spatial topology-enhanced memory, and Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) as a decision-making framework, have led to improvements. However, these architectures struggle to balance exploration and exploitation for ZSON…

论文4: MALLES: A Multi-agent LLMs-based Economic Sandbox with Consumer Preference Alignment

arXiv:2603.17694v1 | | 2026-03-18

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Agent, Multimodal, Training, RAG, Alignment

摘要: In the real economy, modern decision-making is fundamentally challenged by high-dimensional, multimodal environments, which are further complicated by agent heterogeneity and combinatorial data sparsity. This paper introduces a Multi-Agent Large Language Model-based Economic Sandbox (MALLES), leveraging the inherent generalization capabilities of large-sacle models to establish a unified simulatio…

论文5: Feeling the Space: Egomotion-Aware Video Representation for Efficient and Accurate 3D Scene Understanding

arXiv:2603.17980v1 | | 2026-03-18

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG

摘要: Recent Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown high potential for spatial reasoning within 3D scenes. However, they typically rely on computationally expensive 3D representations like point clouds or reconstructed Bird’s-Eye View (BEV) maps, or lack physical grounding to resolve ambiguities in scale and size. This paper significantly enhances MLLMs with egomotion modality data, capture…

论文6: Concept-to-Pixel: Prompt-Free Universal Medical Image Segmentation

arXiv:2603.17746v1 | | 2026-03-18

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Multimodal, Benchmark, Training, RAG, Medical AI, Code Generation

摘要: Universal medical image segmentation seeks to use a single foundational model to handle diverse tasks across multiple imaging modalities. However, existing approaches often rely heavily on manual visual prompts or retrieved reference images, which limits their automation and robustness. In addition, naive joint training across modalities often fails to address large domain shifts. To address these…

论文7: FailureMem: A Failure-Aware Multimodal Framework for Autonomous Software Repair

arXiv:2603.17826v1 | | 2026-03-18

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Agent, Multimodal, Reasoning, Web Agent, Memory, Code Generation

摘要: Multimodal Automated Program Repair (MAPR) extends traditional program repair by requiring models to jointly reason over source code, textual issue descriptions, and visual artifacts such as GUI screenshots. While recent LLM-based repair systems have shown promising results, existing approaches face several limitations: rigid workflow pipelines restrict exploration during debugging, visual reasoni…

论文8: WeatherReasonSeg: A Benchmark for Weather-Aware Reasoning Segmentation in Visual Language Models

arXiv:2603.17680v1 | | 2026-03-18

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent

摘要: Existing vision-language models (VLMs) have demonstrated impressive performance in reasoning-based segmentation. However, current benchmarks are primarily constructed from high-quality images captured under idealized conditions. This raises a critical question: when visual cues are severely degraded by adverse weather conditions such as rain, snow, or fog, can VLMs sustain reliable reasoning segme…

论文9: Process Supervision for Chain-of-Thought Reasoning via Monte Carlo Net Information Gain

arXiv:2603.17815v1 | | 2026-03-18

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Benchmark, Training, Reasoning, Code Generation

摘要: Multi-step reasoning improves the capabilities of large language models (LLMs) but increases the risk of errors propagating through intermediate steps. Process reward models (PRMs) mitigate this by scoring each step individually, enabling fine-grained supervision and improved reliability. Existing methods for training PRMs rely on costly human annotations or computationally intensive automatic lab…

论文10: Interpretable Traffic Responsibility from Dashcam Video via Legal Multi Agent Reasoning

arXiv:2603.17930v1 | | 2026-03-18

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Agent, Multimodal, Reasoning

摘要: The widespread adoption of dashcams has made video evidence in traffic accidents increasingly abundant, yet transforming “what happened in the video” into “who is responsible under which legal provisions” still relies heavily on human experts. Existing ego-view traffic accident studies mainly focus on perception and semantic understanding, while LLM-based legal methods are mostly built on textual …

论文11: ProbeFlow: Training-Free Adaptive Flow Matching for Vision-Language-Action Models

arXiv:2603.17850v1 | | 2026-03-18

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: Multimodal, Robotics, Benchmark, Training, RAG

摘要: Recent Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models equipped with Flow Matching (FM) action heads achieve state-of-the-art performance in complex robot manipulation. However, the multi-step iterative ODE solving required by FM introduces inference latency that precludes responsive physical control. While current acceleration efforts optimize the Vision-Language Model (VLM) backbone, the action head bottlen…

论文12: RPMS: Enhancing LLM-Based Embodied Planning through Rule-Augmented Memory Synergy

arXiv:2603.17831v1 | | 2026-03-18

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Agent, Reasoning, RAG, Memory

摘要: LLM agents often fail in closed-world embodied environments because actions must satisfy strict preconditions – such as location, inventory, and container states – and failure feedback is sparse. We identify two structurally coupled failure modes: (P1) invalid action generation and (P2) state drift, each amplifying the other in a degenerative cycle. We present RPMS, a conflict-managed architectu…

论文13: Facts as First Class Objects: Knowledge Objects for Persistent LLM Memory

arXiv:2603.17781v1 | | 2026-03-18

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Benchmark, Reasoning, RAG, Memory

摘要: Large language models increasingly serve as persistent knowledge workers, with in-context memory - facts stored in the prompt - as the default strategy. We benchmark in-context memory against Knowledge Objects (KOs), discrete hash-addressed tuples with O(1) retrieval. Within the context window, Claude Sonnet 4.5 achieves 100% exact-match accuracy from 10 to 7,000 facts (97.5% of its 200K window). …

论文14: GMT: Goal-Conditioned Multimodal Transformer for 6-DOF Object Trajectory Synthesis in 3D Scenes

arXiv:2603.17993v1 | | 2026-03-18

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: Multimodal, Robotics, Benchmark, Transformer, Training, Reasoning, RAG

摘要: Synthesizing controllable 6-DOF object manipulation trajectories in 3D environments is essential for enabling robots to interact with complex scenes, yet remains challenging due to the need for accurate spatial reasoning, physical feasibility, and multimodal scene understanding. Existing approaches often rely on 2D or partial 3D representations, limiting their ability to capture full scene geometr…

论文15: Governed Memory: A Production Architecture for Multi-Agent Workflows

arXiv:2603.17787v1 | | 2026-03-18

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: Agent, Benchmark, RAG, Memory

摘要: Enterprise AI deploys dozens of autonomous agent nodes across workflows, each acting on the same entities with no shared memory and no common governance. We identify five structural challenges arising from this memory governance gap: memory silos across agent workflows; governance fragmentation across teams and tools; unstructured memories unusable by downstream systems; redundant context delivery…

🏢 行业快报

  • OpenAI 发布新模型更新: OpenAI 持续优化 GPT 系列模型，提升推理能力和多模态理解性能。 (OpenAI Blog)
  • Anthropic Claude 功能增强: Claude 系列模型新增长上下文支持和改进的代码能力。 (Anthropic)
  • Google DeepMind 研究进展: DeepMind 在多模态学习和机器人控制领域取得新的突破。 (Google DeepMind)

📖 全部参考链接

  1. Loc3R-VLM: Language-based Localization and 3D Reasoning with Vision-Language Models
  2. AgentVLN: Towards Agentic Vision-and-Language Navigation
  3. AERR-Nav: Adaptive Exploration-Recovery-Reminiscing Strategy for Zero-Shot Object Navigation
  4. MALLES: A Multi-agent LLMs-based Economic Sandbox with Consumer Preference Alignment
  5. Feeling the Space: Egomotion-Aware Video Representation for Efficient and Accurate 3D Scene Understanding
  6. Concept-to-Pixel: Prompt-Free Universal Medical Image Segmentation
  7. FailureMem: A Failure-Aware Multimodal Framework for Autonomous Software Repair
  8. WeatherReasonSeg: A Benchmark for Weather-Aware Reasoning Segmentation in Visual Language Models
  9. Process Supervision for Chain-of-Thought Reasoning via Monte Carlo Net Information Gain
  10. Interpretable Traffic Responsibility from Dashcam Video via Legal Multi Agent Reasoning
  11. ProbeFlow: Training-Free Adaptive Flow Matching for Vision-Language-Action Models
  12. RPMS: Enhancing LLM-Based Embodied Planning through Rule-Augmented Memory Synergy
  13. Facts as First Class Objects: Knowledge Objects for Persistent LLM Memory
  14. GMT: Goal-Conditioned Multimodal Transformer for 6-DOF Object Trajectory Synthesis in 3D Scenes
  15. Governed Memory: A Production Architecture for Multi-Agent Workflows

📬 AI 日报自动抓取自 arXiv，每日早 8 点更新

💬 重点聚焦：大模型、Agent、多模态、机器人等方向

📊 统计：今日共收录 15 篇论文，其中大模型应用 15 项

item.title: AI 日报 | 2026-03-07
item.description:
AI 日报 | 2026年03月07日（星期六）

📅 日期：2026年03月07日 | 📊 今日收录：15 篇论文 | 🔬 重点领域：LLM、Agent、Reasoning | 🚀 大模型应用：15 项

📌 今日总结

  • MedCoRAG (LLM): Diagnosing hepatic diseases accurately and interpretably is critical, yet it remains challenging in real-world clinical …
  • STRUCTUREDAGENT (LLM): Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have enabled agentic systems for sequential decision-making. Such agents…
  • Mario (LLM): Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have opened new avenues for multimodal reasoning. Yet, most existing met…
  • Observing and Controlling Features in Vision-Language-Action Models (LLM): Vision-Language-Action Models (VLAs) have shown remarkable progress towards embodied intelligence. While their architect…
  • An Exploration-Analysis-Disambiguation Reasoning Framework for Word Sense Disambiguation with Low-Parameter LLMs (LLM): Word Sense Disambiguation (WSD) remains a key challenge in Natural Language Processing (NLP), especially when dealing wi…

🚀 大模型应用亮点

MedCoRAG: Interpretable Hepatology Diagnosis via Hybrid Evidence Retrieval and Multispecialty Consensus

机构:
链接: PDF
标签: LLM, Agent, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG, Medical AI

Diagnosing hepatic diseases accurately and interpretably is critical, yet it remains challenging in real-world clinical settings. Existing AI approaches for clinical diagnosis often lack transparency, structured reasoning, and deployability. Recent efforts have leveraged large language models (LLMs)…

STRUCTUREDAGENT: Planning with AND/OR Trees for Long-Horizon Web Tasks

机构:
链接: PDF
标签: LLM, Agent, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent, Memory

Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have enabled agentic systems for sequential decision-making. Such agents must perceive their environment, reason across multiple time steps, and take actions that optimize long-term objectives. However, existing web agents struggle on complex, long-hor…

Mario: Multimodal Graph Reasoning with Large Language Models

机构:
链接: PDF
标签: LLM, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent, Code Generation

Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have opened new avenues for multimodal reasoning. Yet, most existing methods still rely on pretrained vision-language models (VLMs) to encode image-text pairs in isolation, ignoring the relational structure that real-world multimodal data naturally for…

📚 论文一览

# 论文 第一作者 领域
1 MedCoRAG: Interpretable Hepatology … Unknown LLM, Agent, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG, Medical AI
2 STRUCTUREDAGENT: Planning with AND/… Unknown LLM, Agent, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent, Memory
3 Mario: Multimodal Graph Reasoning w… Unknown LLM, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent, Code Generation
4 Observing and Controlling Features … Unknown LLM, Multimodal, Robotics, Transformer, Alignment, Code Generation
5 An Exploration-Analysis-Disambiguat… Unknown LLM, Benchmark, Training, Reasoning
6 C2-Faith: Benchmarking LLM Judges f… Unknown LLM, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG
7 Leveraging LLM Parametric Knowledge… Unknown LLM, Agent, Benchmark, Training, Web Agent, RAG
8 Wiki-R1: Incentivizing Multimodal R… Unknown LLM, Multimodal, Benchmark, Training, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG
9 Core-based Hierarchies for Efficien… Unknown LLM, Benchmark, Reasoning, RAG
10 Escaping the Hydrolysis Trap: An Ag… Unknown LLM, Agent, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG
11 InfoFlow KV: Information-Flow-Aware… Unknown LLM, Multimodal, Benchmark, Web Agent, RAG
12 WebChain: A Large-Scale Human-Annot… Unknown Agent, Benchmark, Training, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG, Alignment
13 cuRoboV2: Dynamics-Aware Motion Gen… Unknown LLM, Robotics, Benchmark, RAG, Memory, Code Generation
14 Digital Twin Driven Textile Classif… Unknown Multimodal, Robotics, Benchmark, Reasoning
15 KARL: Knowledge Agents via Reinforc… Unknown Agent, Benchmark, Training, Reasoning, RAG

🔍 详细介绍

论文1: MedCoRAG: Interpretable Hepatology Diagnosis via Hybrid Evidence Retrieval and Multispecialty Consensus

arXiv:2603.05129v1 | | 2026-03-05

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Agent, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG, Medical AI

摘要: Diagnosing hepatic diseases accurately and interpretably is critical, yet it remains challenging in real-world clinical settings. Existing AI approaches for clinical diagnosis often lack transparency, structured reasoning, and deployability. Recent efforts have leveraged large language models (LLMs), retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and multi-agent collaboration. However, these approaches typ…

论文2: STRUCTUREDAGENT: Planning with AND/OR Trees for Long-Horizon Web Tasks

arXiv:2603.05294v1 | | 2026-03-05

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Agent, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent, Memory

摘要: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have enabled agentic systems for sequential decision-making. Such agents must perceive their environment, reason across multiple time steps, and take actions that optimize long-term objectives. However, existing web agents struggle on complex, long-horizon tasks due to limited in-context memory for tracking history, weak planning abilities, and greed…

论文3: Mario: Multimodal Graph Reasoning with Large Language Models

arXiv:2603.05181v1 | | 2026-03-05

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Multimodal, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent, Code Generation

摘要: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have opened new avenues for multimodal reasoning. Yet, most existing methods still rely on pretrained vision-language models (VLMs) to encode image-text pairs in isolation, ignoring the relational structure that real-world multimodal data naturally form. This motivates reasoning on multimodal graphs (MMGs), where each node has textual and visual attr…

论文4: Observing and Controlling Features in Vision-Language-Action Models

arXiv:2603.05487v1 | | 2026-03-05

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Multimodal, Robotics, Transformer, Alignment, Code Generation

摘要: Vision-Language-Action Models (VLAs) have shown remarkable progress towards embodied intelligence. While their architecture partially resembles that of Large Language Models (LLMs), VLAs exhibit higher complexity due to their multi-modal inputs/outputs and often hybrid nature of transformer and diffusion heads. This is part of the reason why insights from mechanistic interpretability in LLMs, whic…

论文5: An Exploration-Analysis-Disambiguation Reasoning Framework for Word Sense Disambiguation with Low-Parameter LLMs

arXiv:2603.05400v1 | | 2026-03-05

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Benchmark, Training, Reasoning

摘要: Word Sense Disambiguation (WSD) remains a key challenge in Natural Language Processing (NLP), especially when dealing with rare or domain-specific senses that are often misinterpreted. While modern high-parameter Large Language Models (LLMs) such as GPT-4-Turbo have shown state-of-the-art WSD performance, their computational and energy demands limit scalability. This study investigates whether low…

论文6: C2-Faith: Benchmarking LLM Judges for Causal and Coverage Faithfulness in Chain-of-Thought Reasoning

arXiv:2603.05167v1 | | 2026-03-05

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Benchmark, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG

摘要: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as judges of chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning, but it remains unclear whether they can reliably assess process faithfulness rather than just answer plausibility. We introduce C2-Faith, a benchmark built from PRM800K that targets two complementary dimensions of faithfulness: causality (does each step logically follow from prior context?) and covera…

论文7: Leveraging LLM Parametric Knowledge for Fact Checking without Retrieval

arXiv:2603.05471v1 | | 2026-03-05

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Agent, Benchmark, Training, Web Agent, RAG

摘要: Trustworthiness is a core research challenge for agentic AI systems built on Large Language Models (LLMs). To enhance trust, natural language claims from diverse sources, including human-written text, web content, and model outputs, are commonly checked for factuality by retrieving external knowledge and using an LLM to verify the faithfulness of claims to the retrieved evidence. As a result, such…

论文8: Wiki-R1: Incentivizing Multimodal Reasoning for Knowledge-based VQA via Data and Sampling Curriculum

arXiv:2603.05256v1 | | 2026-03-05

链接: PDF | arXiv

分类: LLM, Multimodal, Benchmark, Training, Reasoning, Web Agent, RAG

摘要: Knowledge-Based Visual Question Answering (KB-VQA) requires models to answer questions about an image by integrating external knowledge, posing significant challenges due to noisy retrieval and the structured, encyclopedic nature of the knowledge base. These characteristics create a distributional gap from pretrained multimodal large language models (MLLMs), making effective reasoning and domain a…

🏢 行业快报

  • OpenAI 发布新模型更新: OpenAI 持续优化 GPT 系列模型，提升推理能力和多模态理解性能。 (OpenAI Blog)
  • Anthropic Claude 功能增强: Claude 系列模型新增长上下文支持和改进的代码能力。 (Anthropic)
  • Google DeepMind 研究进展: DeepMind 在多模态学习和机器人控制领域取得新的突破。 (Google DeepMind)

📖 全部参考链接

  1. MedCoRAG: Interpretable Hepatology Diagnosis via Hybrid Evidence Retrieval and Multispecialty Consensus
  2. STRUCTUREDAGENT: Planning with AND/OR Trees for Long-Horizon Web Tasks
  3. Mario: Multimodal Graph Reasoning with Large Language Models
  4. Observing and Controlling Features in Vision-Language-Action Models
  5. An Exploration-Analysis-Disambiguation Reasoning Framework for Word Sense Disambiguation with Low-Parameter LLMs
  6. C2-Faith: Benchmarking LLM Judges for Causal and Coverage Faithfulness in Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
  7. Leveraging LLM Parametric Knowledge for Fact Checking without Retrieval
  8. Wiki-R1: Incentivizing Multimodal Reasoning for Knowledge-based VQA via Data and Sampling Curriculum
  9. Core-based Hierarchies for Efficient GraphRAG
  10. Escaping the Hydrolysis Trap: An Agentic Workflow for Inverse Design of Durable Photocatalytic Covalent Organic Frameworks
  11. InfoFlow KV: Information-Flow-Aware KV Recomputation for Long Context
  12. WebChain: A Large-Scale Human-Annotated Dataset of Real-World Web Interaction Traces
  13. cuRoboV2: Dynamics-Aware Motion Generation with Depth-Fused Distance Fields for High-DoF Robots
  14. Digital Twin Driven Textile Classification and Foreign Object Recognition in Automated Sorting Systems
  15. KARL: Knowledge Agents via Reinforcement Learning

📬 AI 日报自动抓取自 arXiv，每日早 8 点更新

💬 重点聚焦：大模型、Agent、多模态、机器人等方向

📊 统计：今日共收录 15 篇论文，其中大模型应用 15 项
